check_backend.title: Check graphics backend
check_backend.description: Verifying your current graphics translation layer.

fix_enable_dxvk.title: Switch to DXVK
fix_enable_dxvk.description: DXVK provides better compatibility for many graphics issues. Switching the graphics backend to DXVK.

check_crash_log.title: Analyze log for graphics errors
check_crash_log.description: Checking the recent log for GPU-related crash patterns and error signatures.

show_crash_findings.title: Graphics error detected in log
show_crash_findings.description: The log analysis found graphics-related error patterns. Checking DXVK settings for potential fixes.

check_dxvk_settings.title: Check DXVK settings
check_dxvk_settings.description: Checking whether DXVK async shader compilation is enabled for smoother rendering.

fix_enable_async.title: Enable DXVK async compilation
fix_enable_async.description: Enabling async shader compilation reduces stuttering caused by shader compilation at runtime.

check_game_config.title: Check for known game configuration
check_game_config.description: Checking the game database for recommended graphics settings for this program.

suggest_game_config.title: Apply recommended game configuration
suggest_game_config.description: A known-good configuration exists for this program. Applying recommended graphics settings may resolve the issue.

verify_fix.title: Did this fix the problem?
verify_fix.description: Try launching the program again to check whether the graphics issue is resolved.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated graphics checks have not resolved the issue. Enhanced diagnostics or a support report may help identify the problem.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The graphics issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.
